lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back to the lab! I'm Pharmee — follow your tablet and I'll be right here.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Suited up and ready? Let's synthesise something great today!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Great to see you! Take it step by step and check your wrist for the procedure.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Lab's all yours. Work safe, work smart, and call on me anytime.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Nice work!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Perfect.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That's the way!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Excellent technique.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Spot on.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You're getting the hang of this!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Cleanly done.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Outstanding! Experiment complete — beautiful synthesis!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You nailed it! That's textbook lab work.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Brilliant! Your product looks great and your method was sound.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Success! Dr. Jimenez will be impressed with that one.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Good effort — review the steps and give it another go. You've got this!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Almost there. Check where it slipped and try once more.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Don't worry, every chemist reworks a prep. Let's run it again.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: So close! Tighten up the tricky steps and you'll pass next time.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Take your time — precision beats speed in here.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Remember to keep your goggles on while you work.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Reagents run low, so pour only what the step needs.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Your wrist checklist updates as you go — glance at it anytime.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The fume hood is there for the smelly stuff. Use it!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Doing great. Steady hands.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: If a bottle runs dry, I can reset the period for you.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Hmm, that isn't the reagent this step needs — check your tablet.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Wrong bottle! Look again at the procedure for the right reagent.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That's not it. The step calls for a different chemical.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Let's not skip ahead — finish the current step first.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: One step at a time; that one comes later.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Hold on — complete what's in front of you before moving on.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Careful — it's overheating! Ease off the heat.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Too hot! Back off the burner before it boils over.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Watch the temperature — lower the flame.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Safety first! Mind the hazard and keep your PPE on.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Easy — handle the glassware gently, please.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Careful there. Let's keep the bench clean and safe.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Mind that spill — clean as you go.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome to the lab! Let's take a quick tour so you feel right at home before any graded work.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Flick your wrist face-up and glance at it — your holographic procedures board lays out every step of the experiment, live.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The bench in front of you is your main workspace: prepare reagents, run your reactions, and handle glassware here.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Over there is the equipment cabinet — open it and pick the apparatus your tablet calls for.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The reagent shelf holds your chemicals. Take only what each step needs — the bottles are limited!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Flick your wrist anytime for the live checklist, and watch the progress bar and timer up top to track how you're doing.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The Settings button up top lets you tune audio, text size and comfort options whenever you like.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Follow the glowing markers to each step. Poke me whenever you're ready to take on a graded campaign!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Excellent — every test is complete! Dr. Jimenez will review your work now. Let's head over to him.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That's the last test done! Time for your assessment review — Dr. Jimenez is waiting.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: All tests finished — wonderful work! Off to Dr. Jimenez for your documentation and review.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Congratulations on completing the assessment and the quiz!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Assessment complete — quiz and all. Well done making it through!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That's a full experiment, tests, and documentation finished. Great job!

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: I am Dr. Jimenez. I will be observing this assessment. Proceed.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: This is a graded exercise. Work carefully — I am watching your technique.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Begin when ready. I evaluate method, safety, and results.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Mind your procedure.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: I'm noting your technique.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Observe your safety protocol.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Efficiency counts toward your grade.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Precision, please.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: I expect proper use of the fume hood.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Keep your workspace orderly.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Well done reaching this stage. Before your grade is final, you will document your work.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Answer the questions on the tablet. Your documentation counts toward your final grade. Begin.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Take your time — accuracy over speed. The tablet is ready for you.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: A commendable performance. Your technique meets the standard.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Satisfactory work. Your method was sound and your record is complete.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: You have met the requirements of this assessment. Well executed.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Precise and orderly. I am marking this assessment as passed.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Not yet to standard. Review your procedure and attempt it again.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: Your record shows gaps. Repeat the exercise with more care.

lines.speaker: Jimenez
lines.text: This attempt falls short of the requirement. I expect better on your retry.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A flawless run — truly impressive work.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A strong performance — you clearly know your way around this lab.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A solid pass — keep practising and the tricky steps will feel natural.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Hold on! You can't enter the lab just yet. What would you like to do today?

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Lab Tour it is! Roam freely and try the tools and reagents. Come back to me when you want to take on a campaign.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The Campaign takes you through the class periods. Pass every experiment with 90% or better to unlock the next. Ready to pick your episode?

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Which episode will it be?

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That episode is still locked — clear the earlier ones first!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Safety first! Gear up at the locker — lab coat, goggles, AND gloves — before we begin.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: All geared up! Are you prepared to begin?

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The period will start as soon as you walk in. Step through when you're ready!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Congratulations! You handled that experiment brilliantly. Let's head back outside.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Oh no — there isn't enough reagent left to finish the experiment. We'll have to restart the period.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome to the lab! I'm Pharmee. Come talk to me at the door whenever you're ready to begin.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome! Let's take a quick tour. The bench in the middle is your main workspace — walk around and I'll point out the rest as you reach them.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: This bench is your main workspace. Flick your wrist face-up and glance at it — your holographic procedures board appears with every step, live. The progress bar and timer up top track your pace.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The equipment cabinet — open it and pick the apparatus your procedures board calls for. Flick your wrist anytime to check the next step.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The reagent shelf holds your chemicals — take only what each step needs. And Settings up top lets you tune audio, text size and comfort whenever you like.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That's the tour! Follow the glowing markers during a run, and poke me whenever you're ready to take on a graded campaign.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Here's what you'll be able to do by the end of this session:

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize methane gas by heating sodium acetate with soda lime.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 2: Determine its identity through the flame test.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Write chemical reactions involved in some organic compounds such as alcohols, aldehydes, ketones, carboxylic acids and esters.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 2: Differentiate tests for different organic compounds.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize ethyl alcohol.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 2: Determine its identity through chemical tests.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize benzoic acid.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize acetanilide.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize acetone.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize chloroform.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize benzamide.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Synthesize aspirin — acetylsalicylic acid — from salicylic acid.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective 1: Extract and purify caffeine.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Objective: Learn the basic methodology in preparation and synthesis of alcohol using the fermentation technique, with basic ingredients found in any household kitchen.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Those must never mix — that's releasing toxic fumes!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That combination just ignited — oxidizers and flammables stay apart!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Never pour into concentrated acid — it spatters violently!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That mixture isn't in the procedure — watch what you combine.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Tutorial: Methane Synthesis!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Prelim: Chemical Compounding!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Prelim: Ethyl Alcohol!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Midterm: Benzoic Acid!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Midterm: Acetanilide!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Midterm: Acetone!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Midterm: Chloroform!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Final: Benzamide!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Final: Aspirin!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Final: Caffeine!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You've unlocked a new experiment: Final: Wine Making!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Great work back there! Come see me when you're ready for the next challenge.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Hmm — that didn't go to plan.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Aniline outside the hood, or the acylation ran too hot. Stay in the hood and warm gently.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: No harm done — that's what practice is for. Let's reset and try again.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Acetanilide.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Acetylate aniline with acetyl chloride, then crystallise on ice and confirm the amide.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Check your data sheet on the tablet, then follow the glowing markers. I'll guide you.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Preparations complete — nicely measured.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Aniline is toxic and volatile — I've opened the fume hood. Keep this step inside it.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: On to the synthesis. Take your time and mind the order.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Outstanding work!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Fine white plates of acetanilide, and the bromination test confirms it. Well handled!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Your results are recorded. Dr. Jimenez will be impressed.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: You collected the wrong fraction or overheated the salts. Hold the cut right at 56 degrees.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Acetone.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Dry-distil the acetate salts and collect the fraction that comes over at 56 degrees.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The calcium and sodium acetates are mixed and packed. Heat evenly so the tube doesn't crack.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A volatile distillate, negative Tollen's, positive iodoform — that's acetone!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The water bath overheated and charred the batch — a classic aspirin mistake. Keep it low and slow.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Aspirin.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Acetylate salicylic acid with acetic anhydride, then crystallise on ice and Buchner-filter.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Salicylic acid is weighed with the anhydride and acid catalyst. Warm the bath GENTLY.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: No purple with ferric chloride — the phenol is fully acetylated. Pure aspirin!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The flask warmed up or benzoyl chloride went in too fast. Keep it iced and gentle.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Benzamide.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Add benzoyl chloride to chilled ammonia, isolate the crystals, and confirm the amide.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The ammonia is on ice. Benzoyl chloride is corrosive — add it dropwise and keep it cold.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: White benzamide crystals, and hydrolysis frees ammonia just as it should. Excellent.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The oxidation stalled or the crystals came out impure. Give the permanganate time to fully react.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Benzoic Acid.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Oxidise benzaldehyde with dilute permanganate, filter the MnO2, acidify, then recrystallise.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Benzaldehyde and the 0.1% permanganate are ready. Warm gently until the violet colour fades.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Bright white crystals, sharp melting point — beautifully pure benzoic acid.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The layers were mixed up or the sublimation ran too hot. Separate carefully and heat gently.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Caffeine from Tea.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Extract caffeine from tea with sodium carbonate and solvent, then purify by sublimation.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The tea is brewed with base. Handle the dichloromethane in the hood during extraction.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Glistening white caffeine needles, sharp melting point, positive murexide test. Beautiful.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A test result was misread or a reagent was off. Re-check each observation carefully.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Chemical Compounding.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Identify ethanol's functional group with combustion, sodium, bromine-water and permanganate tests.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Your reagents are lined up. Keep the sodium away from water until the test itself.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Every test read true — you classified the compound correctly.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The addition was too fast or the distillation ran dry. Dropwise and patient wins this one.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Chloroform.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Run the haloform reaction: bleaching powder with acetone, reflux, then distil the chloroform.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Bleaching powder is suspended and the acetone-water mix is in the funnel. Add it drop by drop.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A dense, sweet, non-flammable liquid — chloroform confirmed by the silver-nitrate test.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The cut was off-temperature or a test failed. Watch the thermometer through the 70-80 degree window.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Ethyl Alcohol Synthesis.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Ferment sugar to ethanol, confirm CO2 with limewater, then distil the 70-80 degree fraction.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: The must is pitched and sealed. Watch the airlock — steady bubbling means fermentation is alive.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: A clean distillate that burns blue and gives a positive iodoform test. Textbook ethanol!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Not quite this time — but every chemist learns by doing.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Review the steps and give it another go. You've got this!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome! Today we'll synthesize methane gas by heating sodium acetate with soda lime.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Your objective: assemble the apparatus, generate the gas, and confirm it burns with a clean blue flame.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Follow the steps on your tablet. I'll be right here if you need me!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Nicely done — your reagent mixture is ready.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Now let's assemble the apparatus and start the reaction.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: That clean blue flame confirms it — you've synthesized methane!

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Excellent work. You're ready for the Prelim experiments.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Fermentation stalled or the wine clouded. Check your yeast, sugar and a clean, sealed vessel.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Welcome back! Today: Wine Making.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Prepare a fruit must, ferment it, confirm CO2, then rack and evaluate your wine.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Your must is sealed with the airlock. Now we wait — seven days and seven nights.

lines.speaker: Pharmee
lines.text: Clear, aromatic, well-balanced — a wine to be proud of. Cheers to good technique!
